name: Warden's Folly
specialty: A band of experts in unconventional tactics, specializing in handling the unstable rifts that plague the Undercity, offering a unique service that sets them apart from other adventurer crews.

members.name: Eira Duskwhisper
members.note: Once a high-ranking member of the Iron Fang Consortium, she defected after a mission went awry, leaving behind a legacy of unfulfilled contracts

members.name: Thorne Ironhide
members.note: Known for his distinctive warhammer adorned with the emblem of the Patchwork Saints, he's a brutal but effective fighter

members.name: Sylas Shadowstep
members.note: A catburglar with a penchant for stealing from the rich and corrupt, he's the group's eyes and ears in the Undercity

members.name: Aria Mender
members.note: Always seen with a satchel filled with a myriad of potions and bandages, she's the only member of the group to show any compassion for the less fortunate

visual: Clad in tattered yet functional leather armor, they carry an air of professionalism and experience. Their gear is worn but well-maintained, and each member bears the distinctive mark of the Patchwork Saints on their person.
reputation_note: They are feared by the criminals they pursue and respected by those they protect, but whispers echo through the Undercity of their mysterious past and allegiances
history: [2026-03-14] Completed a investigation-tier contract. Rank: Unknown (+1/5)
